stories.title: Fritz Withdraws from Eastbourne — Wimbledon Fitness Call Blows Draw Wide Open

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Taylor Fritz has withdrawn from Eastbourne as defending champion — last-minute decision after morning warm-up.

Statement: "I'm very sorry." He needed to protect himself for Wimbledon. Draw blown wide open. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #Eastbourne [URL]

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
With Fritz out of Eastbourne, the draw is wide open.

Draper through to SF. Samuel through. Humbert through. Choinski through.

And Djokovic now overtakes Fritz in the ATP live rankings. 🎾 #ATPTour #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Fritz Withdraws from Eastbourne — Defending Champion's Last-Minute Call Puts Wimbledon in Focus

**Article Hero (1200x630):**

stories.title: Dan Evans Plays His Last-Ever Singles Match at Wimbledon Qualifying

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Dan Evans has played his last professional singles match.

Lost to Schoolkate 7-5, 6-0 in Wimbledon qualifying — but he'll still be at the All England Club in doubles.

One of British tennis' finest. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 #BritishTennis [URL]

article.headline: Dan Evans Plays His Last Singles Match — A Career Ends at Wimbledon Qualifying

stories.title: Bad Homburg WTA — Navarro Shocks Swiatek, Svitolina Withdraws

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Emma Navarro has knocked out top seed Iga Swiatek 7-5, 2-6, 6-3 at Bad Homburg.

That's 2 wins in a row for Navarro over Swiatek. Swiatek's first grass match of 2026 — a loss.

Final Saturday. Wimbledon next week. 🎾 #WTA #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

article.headline: Navarro Upsets Swiatek at Bad Homburg as Svitolina Withdraws — Wimbledon Women's Draw Thrown Open

stories.title: Wimbledon Draw Preview — The Questions for Friday's Ceremony

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Wimbledon 2026 draw ceremony is tomorrow — Friday June 26, 10 AM BST.

Where will Djokovic land? Can Sinner coast to the second week? The biggest questions in tennis get answers tomorrow. 🎾 #Wimbledon2026 [URL]

stories.title: Mallorca and Eastbourne Quarterfinalists — Draper, Dimitrov Advance

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
4 days from Wimbledon, the grass-court form book is taking shape:

🎾 Draper into Eastbourne SF (Fritz withdrew)
🎾 Dimitrov vs ADF in Mallorca QF
🎾 Tiafoe leads the Mallorca field

Both finals Saturday. Then it's time. 🎾 #ATPTour #Wimbledon2026 [URL]
